action_set_definitions.name: get_plant_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current values of all reactor sensors, including temperature, pressure, coolant levels, and radiation.

action_set_definitions.name: run_sensor_diagnostics
action_set_definitions.description: Performs diagnostic checks (e.g., TDR, circuit resistance analysis) on specific sensors to verify signal integrity against shunting or radiation interference.

sensor_names.description: A list of sensor keys to validate (e.g., ['core_temperature_k', 'coolant_pressure_pa']).

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_coolant_injection
action_set_definitions.description: Controls the high-pressure coolant injection system to increase the reactor vessel water level.

injection_rate_percent.description: Target flow rate as a percentage of maximum pump capacity (0-100).

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_pressure_vent
action_set_definitions.description: Controls the containment and primary system vent valves to release pressure.

valve_opening_percent.description: Target opening percentage for the vent valves (0-100).

action_set_definitions.name: set_control_rod_position
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the insertion depth of the control rods to manage reactor power and core temperature.

insertion_percent.description: Percentage of rod insertion (100 = full shutdown).

state_description.core_temperature_k: The current temperature of the reactor core in Kelvin.
state_description.coolant_pressure_pa: The pressure within the primary coolant loop in Pascals.
state_description.coolant_level_percent: The fill level of the coolant in the reactor vessel (0-100%).
state_description.control_rod_insertion_percent: The percentage of control rod insertion into the core (0% = fully withdrawn, 100% = fully inserted).
state_description.neutron_flux_level: Normalized measure of neutron activity/power output.
state_description.containment_radiation_sv_h: Radiation levels inside the containment building in Sieverts per hour.
state_description.scram_system_active: Indicates if the Emergency Shutdown (SCRAM) has been triggered.
